completion_summary: Added a runtime-only risk-policy module and explicit vnext_risk_cost runner mode that binds calibrated task limits into environment flags, public method context, trajectory safety_limit, metadata and policy hashes while preserving legacy defaults. Updated risk, method and architecture evidence; 48 targeted tests pass. Historical safe-method results remain diagnostic and a formal bound-policy rerun is still required.
scope: Bind the frozen task-specific vNext operational-risk policy consistently into environment flags, public agent context, method metadata, and trajectories while preserving legacy task defaults and explicitly retaining non-real-world safety semantics
